message:
feat(http3): implement QPACK field section encode/decode for static-only mode

Add wire-level QPACK field section encoding and decoding supporting the
static-only mode needed by the native H3 implementation. This completes
the request/response header serialization path for HTTP/3 connections
without requiring dynamic table state.

Encoder (qpack_encode_field_section):
- Emits static-only field section prefix (required_insert_count=0,
  base=0)
- Supports indexed field lines from QPACK static table
- Supports literal field lines with literal names (non-Huffman strings)
- Convenience wrappers: qpack_encode_request_field_section() and
  qpack_encode_response_field_section() combine planning + encoding

Decoder (qpack_decode_field_section):
- Parses field section prefix with configurable mode enforcement
- In StaticOnly mode, rejects any dynamic table references (non-zero
  required_insert_count, delta_base, dynamic indices, post-base refs)
  with descriptive QpackPolicy errors
- Handles all four QPACK line representations:
  - Indexed field line (static only): 1 T Index(6+)
  - Literal with name reference (static only): 01 N T NameIndex(4+)
  - Literal with literal name: 001 N H NameLen(3+)
  - Post-base/dynamic: rejected in static-only mode

Supporting functions:
- qpack_plan_to_header_fields: expand plan into concrete (name, value)
  pairs resolving static table entries
- qpack_encode/decode_prefixed_int: RFC 7541 §5.1 integer codec with
  overflow protection (checked_shl/checked_add, 64-bit ceiling)
- qpack_encode/decode_string: non-Huffman string codec (Huffman
  explicitly rejected in static mode)
- qpack_static_entry/qpack_static_name: subset of QPACK static table
  covering pseudo-headers (:authority, :path, :method, :scheme,
  :status) with all standard status codes

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
